name: Context Map
description: Agent-readable repo map for CodeSurf. Scans the workspace, builds a lightweight dependency graph, manages context pins, and exposes MCP tools for repo navigation.
author: contex

actions.name: scanWorkspace
actions.description: Scan a workspace and return a lightweight repo map. Params: { workspacePath: string, maxFiles?: number }

actions.name: getRepoMap
actions.description: Return the cached repo map for a workspace, scanning if needed. Params: { workspacePath: string }

actions.name: searchFiles
actions.description: Search files in the cached repo map. Params: { workspacePath: string, query: string, limit?: number }

actions.name: pinContext
actions.description: Pin a file/path as durable workspace context. Params: { workspacePath: string, path: string, label?: string, note?: string }

actions.name: unpinContext
actions.description: Remove a context pin. Params: { workspacePath: string, path: string }

actions.name: listPins
actions.description: List context pins for a workspace. Params: { workspacePath: string }

mcpTools.name: repo_map
mcpTools.description: Return a concise markdown repo map and dependency graph. Params: { workspacePath: string, maxFiles?: number }

mcpTools.name: search_files
mcpTools.description: Search workspace files from the Context Map cache. Params: { workspacePath: string, query: string, limit?: number }

mcpTools.name: pins
mcpTools.description: List context pins for a workspace. Params: { workspacePath: string }

mcpTools.name: pin
mcpTools.description: Pin a path as context for future agents. Params: { workspacePath: string, path: string, label?: string, note?: string }

mcpTools.name: unpin
mcpTools.description: Remove a context pin. Params: { workspacePath: string, path: string }
